AdditionalAttributes.description:
Tip Top® Raisin Toast Loaf brings a delicious start to the morning with juicy raisins and naturally sweet flavour. Baked with Aussie wheat and free from artificial colours, flavours or preservatives, this raisin bread is a source of protein and fibre and suitable for vegans and vegetarians. Enjoy warm and toasted for a comforting breakfast.

Tip Top® is all about home-grown goodness, we bake every day with Aussie wheat, partner with Foodbank to share goodness with the community and use more sustainable packaging whenever we can.
